race.comment: Warrnambool Cup time. ALDER (6) looks the one to beat - he loves the heavy having battled on best to win the Terang Cup on very testing ground latest. Out wide should be ideal by this time of the day and he can complete the 'Cups double', so to speak. XTRA RUSH (10) is racing well and will be rock-hard fit. He's very consistent and wet ground is okay for him. He'll land in a handy spot and give a sight. BASILINNA (2) was just fair in the Mornington Cup last time but that was a slightly strange race. She wants a proper test and will be staying on if that's the case. KHOR (14) was just behind ALDER at Terang last time and has claims off that.

Live1.SchedulerNote: *P1 [LISTED Race] Warrnambool May Racing Carnival - Prize Money: $300,000
